properties.text: All allocations in damon_destroy_targets() in core.c must be freed on every error path
properties.assertion: forall alloc(p) in damon_destroy_targets: on_every_path(exists free(p) OR exists transfer_ownership(p))

properties.text: All allocations in damon_sysfs_destroy_targets() in sysfs.c must be freed on every error path
